title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE EXTENSION OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) IN THE CITY OF DASMARIÃAS, CAVITE INTO A REGULAR DISTRICT OFFICE TO BE KNOWN AS THE LTO DISTRICT OFFICE OF DASMARIÃAS CITY, CAVITE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

chunks.text:
109 OG No. 11, 1574 (March 18, 2013); Philippine Star, November 27, 2012

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10338, November 21, 2012 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE EXTENSION OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) IN THE CITY OF DASMARIÃAS, CAVITE INTO A REGULAR DISTRICT OFFICE TO BE KNOWN AS THE LTO DISTRICT OFFICE OF DASMARIÃAS CITY, CAVITE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Extension Office of the Land Transportation Office (LTO) in the City of Dasmariñas, Cavite is hereby converted into a regular District Office to be known as the LTO District Office of Dasmariñas City, Cavite.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Transportation and Communications shall immediately include in the Departmentâs programs the operationalization of the LTO District Office in Dasmariñas City, Cavite, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current yearâs appropriations of the Dasmariñas City LTO Extension Office. Thereafter, such sums as may be necessary for the continued implementation of this Act shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days following the completion of its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in two (2) national newspapers of general circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on August 3, 2011 and September 17, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

NOV 21 2012

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
